summary: A low rectangular single-story fortified platform with thick decorative banded walls, four prominent corner/side white buttress pillars, two taller square towers on opposite short sides with overhanging dark flat roofs, and an open central courtyard filled with diagonal glowstone-lighted grass paths. Exterior shows layered horizontal materials (brick band, wood band, stone/stonebrick trim) and a raised stone slab coping around the top perimeter.

shape.overall_form: rectangular walled enclosure with interior open courtyard and two raised towers on opposite short sides
shape.symmetry: bilaterally symmetric along the long axis (mirror between the two tower sides) with repeated corner elements

materials.name: stonebrick
materials.role: corner tower vertical trim and lower corner blocks

materials.name: wood
materials.role: horizontal band (planks) between brick and lower trim

materials.name: quartz
materials.role: white vertical buttress pillars and external low blocks

materials.name: glowstone
materials.role: interior pathway lighting and top-of-tower lamp

materials.name: nether_brick
materials.role: dark flat roof surface on towers

elements: external banded walls with three horizontal layers (stone trim, brick band, wood planks)
white vertical buttress pillars evenly spaced along long faces
two tall square towers centered on short sides with overhanging flat dark roofs and glowstone lamps on top
raised stone slab coping around wall perimeter with darker corner blocks
open central courtyard with grass and diagonal lines of glowstone
low white block outline on ground surrounding the structure
rebuild_hints: Start with a rectangular outer foundation roughly 25x17 blocks; build walls about 4-5 blocks tall in layered bands: lower stone/stonebrick corner blocks, a wood plank mid band, a brick band above, then a white horizontal trim and stone slab coping at the top.

Place evenly spaced white vertical buttress pillars (quartz) projecting 2-3 blocks out from the wall on the long sides; add a low row of single white blocks around the perimeter on the ground as an outline.

Construct two identical square towers centered on the short ends rising ~8 blocks high with stonebrick vertical trim, small glass pane windows in a vertical pattern, and a 3-4 block overhanging dark slab roof (nether_brick or dark material) topped with glowstone.
Leave interior courtyard open at ground level, fill with grass and run diagonal lines of glowstone for lighting; add an inner rim of stone slabs around the courtyard edge matching the outer coping.
uncertainties: Exact block types for some white blocks — they appear to be quartz but could be another white block (confidence above reflects best guess).
Lower corner/trim material could be stonebrick or regular stone; identified as stonebrick with moderate confidence.
Dark roofing material on towers looks like nether_brick slabs or dark wood slabs; exact slab type uncertain.
Overall footprint and exact counts are estimated from perspective images; precise block counts may differ by a few units.
